home.title: Home
home.headline: I build cross-platform apps end-to-end — mobile, web, and backend.
home.description: This is a live demo of the patterns I use in production: clean architecture, shared Kotlin Multiplatform business logic, and a Ktor backend. Explore the sidebar, then let's talk.
